summary: Iteration 162: Frontend-only testing for Stripe payout delay information and attendance sheet accent corrections. All features verified successfully.

passed_tests.wallet_payout_delay_hint: PASS - 'Virement reçu sous 2 à 4 jours ouvrés' visible under 'Retirer vers mon compte' button (data-testid='payout-delay-hint')
passed_tests.wallet_modal_delay_banner: PASS - Confirmation modal shows 'Virement effectué sous 2 à 4 jours ouvrés vers votre compte bancaire. Ce transfert est irréversible.'
passed_tests.wallet_payout_history_hint: PASS - PAYOUT_STATUS config includes hint 'Virement initié — réception sous 2 à 4 jours ouvrés' for processing status (code verified)
passed_tests.attendance_present_on_time_accent: PASS - 'Présent(e) à l'heure' displayed with correct French accents (é and à)
passed_tests.attendance_present_late_accent: PASS - 'Présent(e) en retard' displayed with correct French accent (é)
passed_tests.attendance_status_options_visible: PASS - All 4 status options visible: Présent(e) à l'heure, Présent(e) en retard, Absent(e), Je ne sais pas

critical_code_review_comments: WalletPage.js lines 73-89: Payout button and delay hint correctly conditional on wallet.can_payout && wallet.available_balance > 0
WalletPage.js lines 1069-1074: Modal info banner correctly displays delay and irreversible warning
WalletPage.js lines 685-690: PAYOUT_STATUS config includes hint for processing status
WalletPage.js lines 718-720: Payout history correctly shows hint for processing/pending statuses
AttendanceSheetPage.js lines 12-16: STATUS_OPTIONS correctly uses French accents 'Présent(e) à l'heure' and 'Présent(e) en retard'
AttendanceSheetPage.js lines 19-24: STATUS_DISPLAY correctly uses French accents

context_for_next_testing_agent: Stripe payout delay information feature fully implemented and tested. Delay hint appears in 3 places on wallet page: (1) under withdraw button, (2) in confirmation modal, (3) in payout history for processing/pending payouts. Attendance sheet accent corrections verified - 'Présent(e) à l'heure' and 'Présent(e) en retard' now display with correct French accents. Note: Payout delay hint only visible when user has available balance > 0 and can_payout=true.
